summary: Comprehensive testing of CipherStakes Phase 5 retention mechanics completed successfully. Backend API testing achieved 96.55% success rate (56/58 tests passed). All new ascension bonus features working correctly including 30-day progression tracking, atomic bonus award, and dashboard integration. Frontend testing confirmed all regression tests pass and new Ascension card renders properly with correct data-testids and premium dark-luxury styling.

minor_bugs.issue: Login returns same token instead of new token in test comparison
minor_bugs.impact: Very minor - authentication works correctly, just test logic issue

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 409 because draw already executed for current cycle
minor_bugs.impact: Expected behavior - not actually a bug

passed_tests: REGRESSION: POST /api/claims/daily and GET /api/claims/status work unchanged
REGRESSION: Dashboard daily-claim button and 7-day StreakBar work correctly
REGRESSION: Draw entry flow on /api/draws/enter returns proper structure
REGRESSION: Dashboard coin balance displays and updates correctly (50 → 100)
REGRESSION: Daily claim button changes state correctly (Claim 50 Coins → Claimed today)
NEW: GET /api/users/me/ascension returns all required fields (target_entries: 30, current_consecutive, ascension_bonus_claimed, ascension_bonus_amount: 500, progress_pct)
NEW: POST /api/draws/enter includes ascension_bonus field (null for new user as expected)
NEW: Removed endpoints POST /api/users/claim-daily and GET /api/users/streak return 404
NEW: Dashboard renders Ascension card with data-testid='dashboard-ascension-card'
NEW: Ascension progress bar with data-testid='ascension-progress-bar'
NEW: Ascension progress count shows '0/30 consecutive T1 entries' with data-testid='ascension-progress-count'
NEW: Ascension progress percentage shows '0%' with data-testid='ascension-progress-pct'
NEW: Ascension helper text contains correct information about 30 consecutive days and +500 coins with data-testid='ascension-helper-text'
NEW: Premium dark-luxury theme preserved on Ascension card (gold accent, dark surface, rounded-2xl border)
NEW: 30-day Ascension Bonus awards +500 coins atomically on 30th consecutive T1 entry
NEW: Ascension bonus is idempotent (only awarded once)
NEW: ASCENSION_BONUS transaction properly logged in database
NEW: Database indexes created without startup errors
Backend health endpoints (GET /api/, /api/health)
Draws endpoints - 4 draws returned (T1, T2, T3, T4)
T1 Daily Flash jackpot >= $500 (currently $501.00)
Packs endpoint - 5 packs (spark, standard, pro, elite, vault)
Auth flow - register creates user with 50 coins, login works, /me returns profile
Claims flow - daily claim credits 50 coins, second attempt returns credited=false
Draw entry - T2 fails with insufficient coins (400), T1 succeeds with receipt
Stripe checkout - creates session and transaction record
Results endpoints - returns draw results list
User endpoints - referrals and KYC submission work

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all major flows working, new Ascension card fully functional)
